analysis.overall_assessment: Your autonomic function shows excellent stability with a high average HRV of 64.1ms and well-controlled resting HR averaging 46.4 bpm, suggesting your POTS management protocol is working effectively. Sleep quality remains strong at 83.7/100 average with stable temperature deviations at 0.0°C, indicating minimal Hashimoto's flare activity. However, deep sleep averaging only 1.1 hours may be limiting immune repair and vestibular compensation capacity.
